name: deploy-remote

metadata.name: deploy-remote
metadata.summary: Deploy local poject to remote with docker.

documentation:
📦 deploy-remote
=======================

Deploy remote module

Installation
-----

```bash
pip install -i https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/ --extra-index-url https://pypi.org/simple/ deploy-remote
```

Example
-----

```shell
pip install deploy_remote
deploy-remote --help
```
